testcase.name: test_01_login_inspection_head

failure.message: AssertionError: Token not in response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0ODNmMGM5OS0yZjhjLTQyMDctYjQ4NS1lOTM0MTEyMzkwMWQiLCJlbWFpbCI6Imluc3BoZWFkLmluQHdpc2Vkcml2ZS5jb20iLCJleHAiOjE3NzE0ODUxMDh9.d_Xo2ron_s-NNbC0ccR6sJNsy_9krnaj2IkTbzULwt0', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'country_id': 'c49e1dc6-1450-40c2-9846-56b73369b2b1', 'country_name': 'India', 'department_id': 'f0f9442e-96cd-4275-a917-3790e07ef0fc', 'email': 'insphead.in@wisedrive.com', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:93: in test_01_login_inspection_head assert "token" in data, "Token not in response" E AssertionError: Token not in response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0ODNmMGM5OS0yZjhjLTQyMDctYjQ4NS1lOTM0MTEyMzkwMWQiLCJlbWFpbCI6Imluc3BoZWFkLmluQHdpc2Vkcml2ZS5jb20iLCJleHAiOjE3NzE0ODUxMDh9.d_Xo2ron_s-NNbC0ccR6sJNsy_9krnaj2IkTbzULwt0', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'country_id': 'c49e1dc6-1450-40c2-9846-56b73369b2b1', 'country_name': 'India', 'department_id': 'f0f9442e-96cd-4275-a917-3790e07ef0fc', 'email': 'insphead.in@wisedrive.com', ...}}

testcase.name: test_02_get_scheduled_inspections
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:104: in test_02_get_scheduled_inspections assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get inspections: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get inspections: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_get_unscheduled_inspections
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:122: in test_03_get_unscheduled_inspections assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get inspections: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get inspections: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_update_inspection_vehicle_not_found
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:250: in test_08_update_inspection_vehicle_not_found assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_get_mechanics_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:260: in test_09_get_mechanics_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get mechanics: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get mechanics: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:409: in test_14_update_schedule_not_found assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_17_vaahan_api_vehicle_details

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 400] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py:473: in test_17_vaahan_api_vehicle_details assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [200, 400] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
